block_info.name: OB_MainProgram
block_info.description: Main program organization block, calling the calculator function.

body_code:
(* Call the FC_Calculator function block *)
(* Global tags are used for inputs and outputs, prefixed with TAG_ and enclosed in double quotes. *)
FC_Calculator(
    i_Value1    := "TAG_Calc_Value1",
    i_Value2    := "TAG_Calc_Value2",
    i_Operation := "TAG_Calc_Operation",
    q_Result    => "TAG_Calc_Result",
    q_Error     => "TAG_Calc_Error",
    q_ErrorID   => "TAG_Calc_ErrorID"
);
